response:
# Cheaper Alternatives to Pendo

## **Free & Open Source**
- **Hotjar** - Heatmaps, session recordings (freemium)
- **Clarity (Microsoft)** - Free heatmaps & recordings
- **LogRocket** - Session replay (free tier available)
- **PostHog** - Product analytics & feature flags (self-hosted free option)

## **Budget-Friendly SaaS**
- **Fullstory** - Session replay & analytics (~$99-500/mo)
- **Contentsquare** - Analytics & recordings (~$500+/mo)
- **Heap** - Auto-capture analytics (~$500/mo)
- **Mixpanel** - Product analytics (~$999/mo)
- **Amplitude** - Analytics & experiments (~$950/mo)

## **Specialized Alternatives**
| Use Case | Alternative | Price |
|----------|-------------|-------|
| **In-app guidance** | Appcues, Userguiding | $150-500/mo |
| **Feature flags** | LaunchDarkly, Unleash | $100-500/mo |
| **User surveys** | Typeform, Sprig | Free-$500/mo |
| **Analytics** | Plausible, Fathom | $9-200/mo |

## **How to Choose**
- **Self-hosted:** PostHog, Plausible
- **Tight budget:** Clarity, Hotjar free tier
- **Feature-rich:** LogRocket, Fullstory
- **Simple analytics:** Plausible, Fathom

**Best value overall:** PostHog (combines analytics, feature flags, and session replay)

What's your primary use case?
